title: Assistant Store Manager - Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners:
Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners!
